'''âd-r-z''' ('''kadaraz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbaptize|unbaptize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbaptize|unbaptize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-r-z
|-
! Lemma
| kadaraz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidaraz|thidaraz]] || [[word:jidaraz|jidaraz]] || [[word:shidaraz|shidaraz]] || [[word:kidaraz|kidaraz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudaraz|thuthudaraz]] || [[word:jujudaraz|jujudaraz]] || [[word:shushudaraz|shushudaraz]] || [[word:kukudaraz|kukudaraz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudaraz|thudaraz]] || [[word:judaraz|judaraz]] || [[word:shudaraz|shudaraz]] || [[word:kudaraz|kudaraz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudaraz|thudaraz]] || [[word:judaraz|judaraz]] || [[word:shudaraz|shudaraz]] || [[word:kudaraz|kudaraz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedaraz|thedaraz]] || [[word:jedaraz|jedaraz]] || [[word:shedaraz|shedaraz]] || [[word:kedaraz|kedaraz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodaraz|thothodaraz]] || [[word:jojodaraz|jojodaraz]] || [[word:shoshodaraz|shoshodaraz]] || [[word:kokodaraz|kokodaraz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodaraz|thodaraz]] || [[word:jodaraz|jodaraz]] || [[word:shodaraz|shodaraz]] || [[word:kodaraz|kodaraz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodaraz|thodaraz]] || [[word:jodaraz|jodaraz]] || [[word:shodaraz|shodaraz]] || [[word:kodaraz|kodaraz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdaraz|thĂŠdaraz]] || [[word:jĂŠdaraz|jĂŠdaraz]] || [[word:shĂŠdaraz|shĂŠdaraz]] || [[word:kĂŠdaraz|kĂŠdaraz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadaraz|thathadaraz]] || [[word:jajadaraz|jajadaraz]] || [[word:shashadaraz|shashadaraz]] || [[word:kakadaraz|kakadaraz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadaraz|thadaraz]] || [[word:jadaraz|jadaraz]] || [[word:shadaraz|shadaraz]] || [[word:kadaraz|kadaraz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadaraz|thadaraz]] || [[word:jadaraz|jadaraz]] || [[word:shadaraz|shadaraz]] || [[word:kadaraz|kadaraz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadaraz|shadaraz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadaraz|goshadaraz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadaraz|gokishadaraz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadaraznĂŒ|shadaraznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadaraznknĂŒ|goshadaraznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadaraznĂŒ|gokishadaraznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadarazshĂ«|shadarazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadaraznkshĂ«|goshadaraznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadarazshĂ«|gokishadarazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadarazro|shadarazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadaraznkro|goshadaraznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadarazro|gokishadarazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadarazmu|shadarazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadaraznkmu|goshadaraznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadarazmu|gokishadarazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadarazsher|shadarazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadaraznksher|goshadaraznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadarazsher|gokishadarazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadarazng|shadarazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadaraznkng|goshadaraznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadarazng|gokishadarazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadarazya|shadarazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadaraznkya|goshadaraznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadarazya|gokishadarazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadarazyam|shadarazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadaraznkyam|goshadaraznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadarazyam|gokishadarazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadaraznĂŒshĂ«|shadaraznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadaraznknĂŒshĂ«|goshadaraznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadaraznĂŒshĂ«|gokishadaraznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadaraznĂŒro|shadaraznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadaraznknĂŒro|goshadaraznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadaraznĂŒro|gokishadaraznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadaraznĂŒmu|shadaraznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadaraznknĂŒmu|goshadaraznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadaraznĂŒmu|gokishadaraznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadarazshĂ«nĂŒ|shadarazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadaraznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadaraznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadarazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadarazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadarazshĂ«ro|shadarazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadaraznkshĂ«ro|goshadaraznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadarazshĂ«ro|gokishadarazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadarazshĂ«mu|shadarazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadaraznkshĂ«mu|goshadaraznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadarazshĂ«mu|gokishadarazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadarazronĂŒ|shadarazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadaraznkronĂŒ|goshadaraznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadarazronĂŒ|gokishadarazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadarazroshĂ«|shadarazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadaraznkroshĂ«|goshadaraznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadarazroshĂ«|gokishadarazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadarazromu|shadarazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadaraznkromu|goshadaraznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadarazromu|gokishadarazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadarazmunĂŒ|shadarazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadaraznkmunĂŒ|goshadaraznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadarazmunĂŒ|gokishadarazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadarazmushĂ«|shadarazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadaraznkmushĂ«|goshadaraznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadarazmushĂ«|gokishadarazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadarazmuro|shadarazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadaraznkmuro|goshadaraznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadarazmuro|gokishadarazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
